items.title: AI Is Moving up the Software Lifecycle: from Code Review to PRD Governance
items.original_summary: Technology companies are extending AI beyond code generation into earlier stages of the software lifecycle, including PRD validation, design inputs, and code review. Initiatives from Uber, DoorDash, and Cloudflare highlight a shift toward AI-driven governance layers that evaluate engineering artifacts before implementation while preserving human oversight across the development pipeline. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道：Uber、DoorDash、Cloudflare 等公司将 AI 从代码生成扩展到 PRD 校验、设计输入、代码评审等更早的软件生命周期阶段，建立 AI 驱动的 governance 层。这是行业实践综述，没有发布新 SDK、新接口规范或新模型。对现有代码评审流水线无接口层面的破坏性影响。
items.backend_focus: 行动：可参考文章中的 governance 层模式，在现有 CI 中加一道 PRD/设计稿自动校验步骤；不需要修改任何模型调用 SDK 或 API 字段，纯属流程层面参考。

items.title: Vercel Introduces Eve, an Open-Source Framework for Building AI Agents
items.original_summary: Vercel has released Eve, an open-source framework for building, deploying, and operating AI agents in production. The framework uses a filesystem-based project structure to organize agent instructions, tools, skills, subagents, communication channels, and scheduled tasks, enabling developers to define agent behavior while reducing the amount of supporting infrastructure they need to implement. By Daniel Dominguez
items.chinese_summary: Vercel 开源发布 Eve 框架，用于构建、部署、运维生产级 AI agent。Eve 采用基于文件系统的项目结构来组织 agent 指令、工具、技能、子 agent、通信通道与定时任务，减少基础设施样板代码。这是新增的 agent 编排框架，不替代现有 OpenAI/Anthropic SDK，而是上层封装。对已有 agent 系统是可选接入而非强制迁移。
items.backend_focus: 行动：访问 https://github.com/vercel/eve （或官方仓库）评估是否用 Eve 替换自研 agent 编排层；接入时把现有 prompt、tool schema、subagent 配置迁移到 Eve 的文件系统约定；不建议在生产路径首日上线，先在非关键 agent 试点。

items.title: Dapr 1.18 Introduces Verifiable Execution, Bringing Cryptographic Trust to AI Agents and Workflows
items.original_summary: Diagrid has announced the release of Dapr 1.18, introducing what it calls Verifiable Execution, a new set of capabilities designed to bring cryptographic trust, provenance, and tamper-evident execution records to distributed applications and AI agents. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Dapr 1.18 发布 Verifiable Execution 能力，为分布式应用与 AI agent 提供加密可验证的执行信任、来源与防篡改记录。这是 Dapr 运行时层新增能力，不改变用户对 LLM 的调用方式（model 字段、response_format 等不变），但 agent workflow 的状态存储与执行日志格式会有新增字段。升级到 1.18 需关注 actor/workflow 组件的兼容矩阵。
items.backend_focus: 行动：如使用 Dapr 跑 agent workflow，先在测试环境升级到 1.18 并跑 actor/workflow 回归；新增的 Verifiable Execution 默认不一定开启，按需在 dapr.yaml 中显式配置；关注官方组件兼容列表，确认当前使用的 state store（Redis/PostgreSQL 等）支持新签名格式。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft Build 2026 上 Azure Kubernetes Service（AKS）大规模更新，新增 Bare Metal、Fleet Management 与 AI 基础设施能力，把 Kubernetes 打造成 AI 训练与推理的一等平台。这是 AKS 平台层增强，不改变 Pod 内调用 LLM API 的方式（OpenAI/Anthropic SDK 仍照常工作），但新增了 AI 负载调度与 GPU 共享配置项。
items.backend_focus: 行动：如用 AKS 跑推理工作负载，可评估升级到最新 AKS 并启用 AI/GPU 相关 addon；在 Helm/manifest 中关注新增的 fleet、bare metal 节点池字段；如果已经在用 AKS 跑 LLM 推理，关注 max_tokens 与并发配置是否需要按新调度器调优。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 上完全端侧运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，兼容 PyTorch 转换的自定义模型与预优化开源模型。这是 Apple 平台原生 AI 框架，iOS/macOS 开发者可下掉部分 Core ML + 自研推理胶水代码。对调用云端 OpenAI/Anthropic API 的服务没有影响。
items.backend_focus: 行动：如开发 Apple 平台端侧 AI 功能，可评估用 Core AI 替换现有 Core ML + 自研 tokenizer/runtime 代码；按官方迁移指南转换 PyTorch 模型；不影响服务端调用云端 LLM 的代码路径，两套链路可并存。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 发布 Chunk Sidecars，把 CI 风格的校验直接嵌入 AI 编码 agent 的内部开发循环。这是 CI 平台针对 AI agent 工作流的新增能力，不是新模型或新 LLM SDK；接入方式是在 CircleCI 配置中启用 Sidecar 并定义 chunk，agent 在生成代码时可触发校验。
items.backend_focus: 行动：若已用 CircleCI + AI agent，先在 .circleci/config.yml 中启用 Chunk Sidecars 试点；不需要修改任何 LLM API 字段或 SDK 版本；关注 CircleCI 官方文档了解 chunk 粒度与超时配置，避免校验过重拖慢 agent 循环。

items.title: Article: Understanding ML Model Poisoning: How It Happens and How to Detect It
items.original_summary: In this article, the author explores data poisoning as a threat to machine learning systems, covering techniques such as label flipping, backdoors, clean-label poisoning, and gradient manipulation. The article reviews real-world incidents, discusses the challenges of detecting poisoned data, and presents practical defenses, tools, and operational practices for securing ML training pipelines. By Igor Maljkovic
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 深度文章：系统讲解 ML 模型投毒攻击，包括 label flipping、backdoor、clean-label poisoning、gradient manipulation 等手法，并给出训练管线的检测与防御建议。这是安全科普长文，没有新 SDK、新 API 字段或新模型发布。对已经在做模型训练或数据采购的团队是流程层面的参考。
items.backend_focus: 行动：在模型训练管线加入数据来源审计、label 分布异常检测与梯度异常监控；不需要修改任何 LLM API 字段或 SDK 版本；如使用第三方数据集，按文中建议在 ingest 阶段做 schema 与分布校验。

items.title: Article: Governing AI in the Cloud: a Practical Guide for Architects
items.original_summary: In this article, the author outlines a practical approach to AI governance in the cloud, covering discovery of shadow AI, data classification at creation, IAM-based enforcement, policy-as-code, and operational controls. The article shows how organizations can embed governance into delivery pipelines, balancing security, compliance, and developer productivity without relying on manual processes. By Dave Ward
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 架构师实战指南：在云环境中实施 AI 治理，覆盖影子 AI 发现、数据分类、IAM 强制、policy-as-code 与运营控制。属于方法论与流程建议，没有新 SDK、新 API 字段或新模型。对已经在用云 IAM 与 IaC 的团队可直接落地方案。
items.backend_focus: 行动：在 CI/CD 中加入 policy-as-code（OPA/Sentinel）校验 LLM API key 调用与数据分类标签；不需要修改 LLM SDK 字段；优先治理影子 AI：在网络出口审计对 OpenAI/Anthropic 等域名的调用。

items.title: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own
items.original_summary: Stack Overflow has announced Stack Overflow for Agents, a beta API-first knowledge exchange aimed at AI coding agents rather than human developers. The service is presented as a way to close what the company calls the Ephemeral Intelligence Gap, where agents repeatedly rediscover the same fixes and patterns in isolation instead of sharing them through a common memory. By Matt Saunders
items.chinese_summary: Stack Overflow 推出 Stack Overflow for Agents，beta 阶段的 API-first 知识交换服务，专为 AI 编码 agent 而非人类设计，意在解决 agent 各自重复发现同一修复的 Ephemeral Intelligence Gap。这是面向 agent 的外部知识源，没有新模型或新 LLM SDK，但提供了新的 API endpoint 与鉴权方式。
items.backend_focus: 行动：评估在自家 agent 中接入 Stack Overflow for Agents API 作为工具；按官方文档申请 API key 与配额；不要在 prompt 中硬编码调用，改成 tool use 形式以便后续替换知识源。

items.title: Oracle's OpenJDK Bans Generative AI Contributions While Oracle's GraalVM Allows Them
items.original_summary: Two related, Oracle-backed projects published opposing policies on open-source contributions created with generative AI: the OpenJDK Governing Board approved an interim policy prohibiting such contributions, while the Coding Assistants policy from GraalVM permits them. Both projects require contributors to sign the same Oracle Contributor Agreement (OCA) for intellectual property. By Karsten Silz
items.chinese_summary: Oracle 旗下两个开源项目发布相反的生成式 AI 贡献政策：OpenJDK Governing Board 通过临时政策禁止 GenAI 贡献，而 GraalVM 的 Coding Assistants 政策则允许。两者都要求签署同一份 Oracle Contributor Agreement（OCA）。这是开源治理政策差异，不涉及模型、API 或 SDK 的工程变更。
items.backend_focus: 行动：如果团队向 OpenJDK 提交 PR，确保作者声明中不含未审核的 GenAI 生成代码；向 GraalVM 提交时遵循其允许政策并保留生成过程记录；与 LLM API 字段、SDK 版本无任何关系，无需代码改动。
